input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.6.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.6.3.3
            TITLE: the front hoop braces must be constructed to protect the driver’s legs and should extend to

            CONTENT:
            rule F.6.3.3: The Front Hoop Braces must be constructed to protect the driver’s legs and should extend to
F.6.3.3 The Front Hoop Braces must be constructed to protect the driver’s legs and should extend to 
the structure in front of the driver’s feet.

final_answer: The Front Hoop Braces must be constructed to protect the driver’s legs and should extend to the structure in front of the driver’s feet.
